vllm.title: [Hardware][Apple] Native support for macOS Apple Silicon
vllm.author: wallashss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add some adjustments on ARM/CPU build scripts to build and run directly on Mac Os with Apple Chip.
Summary:

Added some conditional setup on build to consider Mac Os as a valid device
Adjusted some intrinsics implementation to proper work with Clang
Set NUMA as optional for build on CPU and automati

vllm.title: [VLM] Reorganize profiling/processing-related code
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR further reorganizes code related to multi-modal profiling and processing.

ProcessingMixin has been merged with ProfilingInfo, no longer a mixin, and renamed to ProcessingInfo.
A separate class, BaseDummyInputsBuilder, has been created to set up the dummy processor inputs. It contains an ins

vllm.title: [Doc] Move examples into categories
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow up PR for #11782

Move all examples into one of the three categories (Offline Inference, Online Serving, Other)
Incorporates the shell scripts into the examples too

vllm.title: [Doc][4/N] Reorganize API Reference
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR renames API Reference pages from /dev/... to /api/..., with the following additional changes:

Moved Multi-Modality page from Design Documents to API Reference

Removed the deprecated Multi Modal Plugin page.


Merged Sampling Parameters and Pooling Parameters into a single page.
Fixed links

vllm.title: [CI/Build][Bugfix] Fix CPU CI image clean up
vllm.author: bigPYJ1151

vllm.title: [Bugfix][XPU] fix silu_and_mul
vllm.author: yma11
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The order of input args matters for xpu silu_and_mul call, so use the op wrapper in _ipex_ops instead.

vllm.title: [Misc] Move some model utils into vision file
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR moves get_vit_attn_backend and resolve_visual_encoder_inputs to vision.py to reduce clutter inside utils.py. (Note: merge_multimodal_embeddings is not moved because it covers audio as well)

vllm.title: [Doc] Expand Multimodal API Reference
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR expands the API Reference for multi-modality so that upcoming tutorials can refer to them.

vllm.title: [Misc]add some explanations for BlockHashType
vllm.author: WangErXiao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add some explanations for BlockHashType.  Hash collisions can still theoretically occur, albeit with an extremely low probability.
#11829

vllm.title: [TPU][Quantization] TPU `W8A8`
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

support TPU for compressed-tensors w8a8 models.
To run, just load a W8A8 model:

from vllm import LLM
model = LLM("neuralmagic/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct-quantized.w8a8", max_model_len=2048)
model.generate("Hello my name is")
TESTING:

 verified accuracy on TPU for Llama-8B on TP=1 (exact

vllm.title: [Kernel][Triton][AMD] Use block size heuristic for avg 2.8x speedup for int8 models
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Use the heuristic from scaled_mm_c3x_sm90_int8_dispatch.cuh:116 to choose block-size for triton_scaled_mm instead of always using 32x32x32 for better performance.  This results in average 2.8x speedup.
I ran:
python benchmarks/benchmark_latency.py --dtype bfloat16 --enable-chunked-prefill False --lo

vllm.title: [CI] Turn on basic correctness tests for V1
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Ran into some OOM issues in #9856. Turning on this test to see if the problems happen without the TP changes.

vllm.title: treat do_lower_case in the same way as the sentence-transformers library
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #11184
In PR #9506 we assumed that the do_lower_case flag in the sentence_bert_config.json file was meant to be passed as argument to the parameter of the same name in the tokenizer's init method. However, what the sentence transformer library actually does is to call lower() in the prompt bef

vllm.title: [Doc] Recommend uv and python 3.12 for quickstart guide
vllm.author: mgoin

vllm.title: [Misc] Move `print_*_once` from utils to logger
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Clean up the vllm.utils file a bit by moving the print_*_once functions to the logger itself.
I'm planning further changes to the vllm.utils file. It has become quite disorganized over time.

vllm.title: [perf]fix current stream
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
fix the performance regression reported from #11744 (comment)
on my local benchmark:
python benchmarks/benchmark_latency.py --model meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-70B --load-format dummy --enforce-eager -tp 4
main branch:
Avg latency: 2.945735554069203 seconds
10% percentile latency: 2.924619035271462 seco
